entry.title: Transformer Retrieval for Long Context
entry.summary: We study retrieval enhanced transformer methods for long context reasoning.

entry.title: Diffusion Models for Scientific Discovery
entry.summary: This work explores diffusion-based generation for scientific hypothesis search.

entry.title: Vision Language Alignment with Sparse Tokens
entry.summary: We propose sparse token alignment for robust vision language representation learning.

entry.title: Efficient RLHF under Budget Constraints
entry.summary: We benchmark cost-aware RLHF strategies and present a stronger baseline.
